subcodes.title: Address to the Baha'is at Parsons home in Washington, 1912-04-24
subcodes.first_line: You are welcome this afternoon, most welcome. I am ever happy to see you. I ask God that meeting me... O Thou merciful God! O Thou Who art mighty and powerful!
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @historical episodes and the lessons of the past, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @Declaration of Baha'u'llah, @praise and encouragement, @cycles in the physical and spiritual worlds
